```{r, include=FALSE}
irysy = iris
irysy <- irysy %>% rename(all_of(c(PL = 'Petal.Length',
                                    PW = 'Petal.Width',
                                    SL = 'Sepal.Length',
                                    SW = 'Sepal.Width')))

split <- irysy %>% initial_split(prop = 2/3) 
train <- training(split)
test <- testing(split)
```
